//: SPU-13 Sovereign Engine — VS Code snippets for Sovereign Assembly (.sas)

Load register (surd immediate).description: Load a surd immediate into a scalar register (a + b·√3)

Pell rotation step.description: Multiply register by the Pell rotor (2+√3)

body: SNAP  ; Davis Gate: assert manifold laminar
Davis Gate SNAP assert.description: Assert that the manifold is in a laminar (stable) state

Pell rotor loop.description: Full Pell rotor loop: seed, rotate, log, repeat

Load Quadray register.description: Load scalar register value into a Quadray register

body: EQUIL  ; Vector Equilibrium check — hex sum must = (0,0)
Vector Equilibrium check.description: Assert Vector Equilibrium: all 12 Quadray vectors sum to zero

body: JINV R${1:0}  ; Janus flip: negate surd component
Janus flip.description: Janus inversion: flip the surd (√3) component sign

body: ; C = τ/K: if ΣABCD ≠ 0 (Cubic Leak), Henosis (soft recovery) fires
SNAP  ; assert manifold laminar before critical section
SNAP  ; assert manifold laminar after critical section
Davis Gate block.description: Davis Gate block: bracket critical code with SNAP stability checks

body: SPREAD R${1:0}, QR${2:0}, QR${3:1}  ; Wildberger spread
Wildberger spread.description: Compute the Wildberger Spread (sin²θ ratio) between two Quadray vectors
